text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp's coming to an end...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Seiun Sky did everything I asked of her at
camp, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No, get over that already. This is a secret tactical meeting! You do wanna come up with a strategy for the Kikuka Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike last year, she didn't offer up a single
strategy. So now...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I've gone from first-rate to outlandishly
superior first-rate!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No, it's quite all right. Sky's fecklessness is her issue.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've polished my racing arsenal, you
know—sufficiently enough to crush you in the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But what's happened with you? Did you spend
your summer continuing down the path of
impropriety?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...I dunno. Trainer, I'm gonna go ahead and get on
the bus.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: She hasn't seriously lost her will to fight, has she?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the Takarazuka Kinen, she's been
acting so strangely. Did she lose her desire to
race after competing against Special Week and
the others?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky has overcome obstacle after obstacle
without giving up once. There's no way she'd
throw in the towel now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Remember—you mustn't be afraid to use the stick
when the carrot doesn't do the job.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is over, but I'm left with some work
to do as a trainer.
